name: Laser Dodge Arena
description: Enter the neon danger zone in Laser Dodge Arena! Your goal is simple: survive as long as possible. Dodge the deadly red lasers that appear randomly and move faster the longer you survive. Collect blue Shield Orbs to protect yourself and earn Coins based on your survival time. Visit the Shop to unlock cool new skins and gradient effects for your character. Can you top the leaderboard and become the ultimate survivor?
instructions: PC - Arrow Keys WASD to move Mobile - Touch and drag to move the player Objective - Avoid lasers and survive as long as possible
